headline: Zoetis Inc (NYSE:ZTS) Offers High-Quality Dividend Growth and Strong Profitability at a Discount
summary: Zoetis offers a reliable 1.64% dividend yield with strong safety and 20.56% annual growth. Backed by stellar profitability and a cheap P/E of 11.56, ZTS is a top-tier dividend stock for income-focused investors.
